faq-2.answer: No. BYOA — use your own AI provider.
faq-2.question: Do I pay for AI?

faq-3.answer: Normalize scans your source files for hardcoded strings, extracts them into content models, and patches your source with content references.
faq-3.question: How does normalize work?

faq-4.answer: Yes! Contentrain is framework-agnostic. Vue, React, Svelte, Astro, Next.js — all supported.
faq-4.question: Can I use it with any framework?
